problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
hypothesis: Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region may resolve What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
